response.overview: During the years of terrorist violence, a National Police squad undertook the perilous mission of disarming the explosives planted throughout the country by Shining Path and the MRTA. The documentary "With My Soul in Suspense" tells the human stories of the veterans who risked their lives for society, though some heroically perished in their mission. The press focused on the attacks that occurred, but not so much on those that were prevented. The documentary centers on the latter, through heroic stories recounted by the protagonists themselves, stories that will leave the viewer breathless.
response.title: Con el alma en vilo
